message:
test(runtime): add determinism and coverage tests for program loop

Add comprehensive test coverage for the ftui-runtime module, focusing on
command execution determinism and subscription management (bd-2nu8.10.x).

**Program Tests (program.rs, bd-2nu8.10.1)**
- `cmd_sequence_executes_in_order`: Verifies Cmd::Sequence maintains declared
  order - critical for operations that depend on prior state changes
- `cmd_batch_executes_all_regardless_of_order`: Confirms all batched commands
  execute (order may vary but all must complete)
- Tests use the ProgramSimulator for isolated, synchronous verification

**Simulator Tests (simulator.rs, bd-2nu8.10.3)**
- `identical_inputs_yield_identical_outputs`: Runs same scenario 3 times,
  verifies model state AND rendered frame bytes are bit-identical
- `command_log_records_in_order`: Verifies CmdRecord::Log entries appear in
  the order they were emitted, ensuring audit trail reliability
- These tests catch non-determinism bugs like HashMap iteration order issues

**Subscription Tests (subscription.rs, bd-2nu8.10.2)**
- `stop_signal_is_cloneable`: Verifies StopSignal clone semantics
- `stop_signal_wait_wakes_immediately_when_already_stopped`: No spurious waits
- `stop_signal_wait_is_interrupted_by_trigger`: Cross-thread signaling works
- `mock_subscription_*`: Edge cases for the test infrastructure itself

All tests are synchronous and deterministic - no flaky async timing issues.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
